description_long: This mailbox features a barn-style design with a red, horizontally paneled main body and a prominent black gabled roof. The front face has a circular opening above a decorative black accent, likely serving as the mail retrieval door. The sides each have a rectangular mail slot with a small overhang, and one side is equipped with a black mail flag. The mailbox is mounted atop a tall, square metal pole, giving it a sturdy and elevated presence suitable for curbside or roadside installation. The materials appear to be primarily painted metal or wood for the body, with a metal pole for support. The overall look is both functional and decorative, making it a distinctive feature in an urban or suburban environment.
description: A red barn-style mailbox with a black gabled roof, circular front opening, side mail slot, and mounted on a tall metal pole. Features a decorative accent and a visible mail flag.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular mail slot, black flag, and the red paneled body beneath the black roof.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red back panel and the overhanging black roof, with no visible openings or slots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a rectangular mail slot but no flag, highlighting the same red and black color scheme.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a circular opening above a black decorative accent, with the gabled roof and red paneling clearly visible.
